description.value: Aura faint illusion; CL 3rd; Slot ring; Price 12,700 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION As a free action, the wearer of this ring can gain the ability to magically blend in with the surroundings. This provides a +10 competence bonus on her Stealth checks. As a standard action, she can also use the spell disguise self as often as she wants. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Spells disguise self, invisibility; Cost 6,350 gp
